rag_rules: Preserve scope ownership: type-level contract content stays in component types, while implementation-level bindings stay in component implementations.
Fuse AGREE content as an `annex agree {** ... **};` block and keep implementation-scope annexes ordered after the declarations they rely on.
generic_rules: Use the source AADL model as the authority for owners, identifiers, and existing structure during fusion.
Apply the smallest possible text edit: add the annex without altering unrelated declarations or architecture.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Inserted AGREE content must remain wrapped as a valid AADL annex block.
Preserve the original owner kind and local context when merging generated text.
anti_patterns: Do not rename model elements or rewrite structural AADL declarations while inserting an annex.
Do not move content across type and implementation scopes just to make references appear to fit.
irrelevant_topics: Validator repair rules for Boolean, numeric, or event-port expressions
Treating AADL property names or units as AGREE variables
